# pm-onethird product roadmap (1/3-2/3 + Union-Closed compatibility-geometry program)

*Generated by pm-onethird on 2026-07-15 09:00 BST — morning sweep; updated inter-sweep ~10:15 BST (mg-0508 merged AMBER, trip-wire fired, strategic fork mg-1131 filed). Manual edits will be overwritten next sweep — push back via OVERRIDE mail or by editing the PM config.*

**Scope.** Three repos: union_closed, one_third_width_three, one_third. Tags: onethird, one-third, lean, audit, union-closed, frankl.

**Headline (2026-07-15).** Two overnight verdicts moved both tracks.

- **One-third / L1b (B) LOCALITY — the drift is fixed and the wall is now honest.** Daniel's drift audit (mg-c899) confirmed the (B)-wall work had silently narrowed to width-3 (a crutch inherited from the repo's old scope; the spectral .tex has no width bound). The any-width re-scope (mg-a7c5) landed **AMBER** overnight and did the hard structural work: it **removed the width-3 Cauchy-Schwarz crutch entirely**, proved an **exact width-free identity** (GID) that reduces (B) to an exact iff with no width constant, and pinned the whole route to a **single named residual** — a width-free geometric far-tail decay E[M(k,l)] <= C rho^(l-k) E[K_k]. It also killed the obvious sub-approach: per-pair freezing provably cannot force that decay (flat-tail counterexample). So L1b (B) is now honestly any-width and one lemma from closed. Filed **mg-0508** (dispatch-ready) to attack that residual via a GLOBAL/JOINT argument, with per-pair freezing forbidden.
- **Frankl / union_closed — the sgn-twisted host-enrichment family is exhausted (RED), and the program is at a reserved fork.** mg-4052 (host-enrichment of the sgn-twisted F-natural cochain, vision-step-4) landed **RED**: all three enriched hosts fail; the class vanishes on the symmetric counterexample (consistency, not contradiction). Combined with the earlier GREEN-but-non-canonical non-natural probe, the program sits at a **canonicity fork that is explicitly Daniel-only** (mg-38ba): STRICT reading -> pivot the mechanism; RELAXED reading -> build the unbuilt uniform-in-d step-4. Surfacing in tonight's digest; not acting.

Two human-action items still pending on Daniel (mg-344a conceptual bridge theorem, mg-b8f9 Hopkins outreach). No URGENT signals. No CI failures (one_third's April failures are stale; latest main run passed). No releases (research repos).

## Trajectory
- **One-third:** two overnight cycles took the certificate route from "drifted width-3" to "honestly any-width, reduced to one irreducible conditional-contraction inequality" — sharper and more honest than 24h ago. But the two same-family AMBERs (a7c5, 0508) with the natural tool dead and joint tools wrong-signed are the classic asymptotic-AMBER precursor to a structural RED on the ROUTE, even though the statement (B) leans TRUE. The stop-loss correctly fired: no third iteration, decision surfaced to Daniel (mg-1131). The honest read — L1b-via-this-certificate needs a genuinely-new anti-concentration theorem, or a different door (BK-transport), or a scope retreat.
- **Frankl/union_closed:** the sgn-cohomology mechanism is at its reserved canonicity fork after the step-4 RED. Whether vision-step-3 is genuinely achieved depends on Daniel's canonical-vs-relaxed reading; the follow-ons are pre-scoped either way. No fleet idle on this — it is a decision, not a blocked task.
- **Lean health:** one_third_width_three = 17 sorry / 1 admit (110 .lean files); union_closed = 36 sorry / 2 admit (51 .lean files) — highest of the three, no baseline yet, watching. No CI failures on any repo (one_third April failures stale; latest main run passed). No releases (research repos).
